markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect to explore a content partnership between GrowthX and Plaid.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Plaid's Need:** Scale content on new topics (AI, lending) and build interactive tools (e.g., calculators) to capture AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A hybrid model using AI workflows for speed and expert human oversight for quality, acting as a team extension to unblock Plaid's internal bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Proof of Concept:** GrowthX's work for Ramp, creating 900+ programmatic pages (vendor directories, calculators) using internal data, directly aligns with Plaid's interactive content goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A 45-min deep-dive demo is scheduled for Wednesday, Oct 29, to review the platform and address tactical questions, including CMS publishing logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

## Topics

### Plaid's Content Challenges & Goals

  - [**Team & Focus:** Tom Sullivan (Content Strategist) and Richie Lauridsen (Organic Growth) manage the `plaid.com/resources` hub.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**Primary Need:** Scale content on new topics where Plaid lacks visibility, such as:](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [AI & Fintech](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [New lending types](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Gaps in core product coverage](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Current Bottlenecks:** Slow internal review processes hinder content velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Develop interactive, tool-based content (e.g., calculators) to drive engagement and improve AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**AI Usage:** Plaid uses AI to *enhance* human-led content (e.g., outlining, style checks), not for full generation, to maintain a high standard of subject matter expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: Hybrid Content Model

  - [**Approach:** A hybrid model combining AI workflows for speed with expert human oversight for quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Team Structure:** Each client gets a dedicated team (Managing Director, Editor, Content Manager) with deep SEO/content backgrounds (e.g., ex-TechCrunch, G2).](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** A 4-week sprint to build context artifacts (ICP, brand voice) and a content roadmap, with publishing starting by week 4.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Growth Execution):** Focus on high-velocity publishing (e.g., daily) or a smaller volume of high-quality pieces, depending on client goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [**Platform:** An internal platform built by GrowthX's founder (ex-CMO at Scale, HashiCorp) to solve the content scaling challenges he faced.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Features:** Custom knowledge bases, source-specific research, and fact-checker agents.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Deliverables:** Includes cover images and infographics; custom design assets are negotiable.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

### Ramp Case Study: Proof of Concept

  - [**Relevance:** Demonstrates GrowthX's ability to execute on Plaid's goal of creating interactive, tool-based content.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**Project:** Created 900+ programmatic pages for Ramp, including:](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [**Vendor Directory:** Reviews, comparisons, and alternatives pages for business tools.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Interactive Tools:** Per diem calculator, expense classifier, and an interactive map.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [**Key Tactic:** Populated pages with Ramp's internal spend data, visualized in interactive charts, to create unique, authoritative content.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

### Logistics & CMS Publishing

  - [**CMS:** Plaid uses Contentful, which has a steep learning curve for resource articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [**GrowthX Capability:** The team has experience with Contentful and can handle staging/publishing, contingent on security access.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Requires a meeting with Plaid's web team to understand the specific Contentful setup.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Heather Staples:** Schedule a 45-min deep-dive demo for **Wednesday, Oct 29, at 12:30 PM PT**.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Prepare a demo of the GrowthX platform and be ready for tactical Q\&A.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [**Plaid Team:** Prepare tactical questions, especially regarding Contentful publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Fv99kUVSw-o_r-BJ5-2SHwbyhhPa3ZN9?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
